textByHash.080dde3400b30a352332cac03bada4f81abafa47: It is but the smallest of our worries. We get by, we survive, on the miserable harvests that I grow here. The price of our survival is what pains me, as it is a price I have paid with the souls of others.
textByHash.0d49ec90aac99cdafc0845cb5708baac5ec50850: Yes, you have demonstrated that you have some moderate skills as a farmer. Take these seeds, and do with them what you will.
textByHash.29c8f7b56e1608d849911aa0b4e3d8c06dc8ea40: I would not talk so if I were you - I know a secret call that will bring the vampyres here right now, and then you may live only long enough to feel regret for your impertinence.
textByHash.31cc5006f791a7dd7529600ec69a692ccdf4f797: I would give you some orchid seeds, but I fear that you would not have the space to carry them.
textByHash.3399ceff58218b6f62135d7f7270bc9000be8509: Then begone simple fool and halt your churlish tongue. There are things about me that would leave you with nightmares for the rest of your life.
textByHash.75512e88f695941bea758e4a47a88a63dc67e2d0: And leave behind all that we possess?!? Never!!!
textByHash.8e21585ebe21355eb8d292fb21180f87a8090f58: Please, do not bother me - I have problems to attend to.
textByHash.add6def2b8fe74c01457fdfea7ef3a1433388d03: As you ask so nicely I will relate my problems to you, but I very much doubt that you may help me at all.
textByHash.ae8cb9525c6a6b3f30905ba43d3e85ebfd2dc266: Speak to me when they are fully grown. You need not pick them for me, I will be able to assess your skills by simply watching you.
textByHash.af3a011b88bb5bf7c4bb115b9f865d0471a05ca8: If your time is so pressing then leave me be and go about your business!
textByHash.b0aa0670d11e578629d691977c15a899da181554: You must think it strange that a girl such as myself would choose to ply her trade in a place such as this, this darkest of lands.
textByHash.d6e6ca69a9734fd88f3db8fb93857541a8cddb92: Yes, you have demonstrated that you have some moderate skills as a farmer, but I fear that you would not have the space to carry them.
textByHash.d8016306dc8c3d4991338656c74dd3ed3ac5628d: Please - ask me no more. You said that you were looking for some orchid seeds? I do have some as a matter of fact, and you may as well have them because they do not grow well in this grim land.
textByHash.db471851655e5dc765174c4590237e17c7ecea29: This feeling in my head - it is so strange - and it is a feeling I have felt before, although I cannot explain it. If you are trying to use some unnatural power over me, you have failed.
textByHash.dfe5ad238f67c3e17a20419cd2bb34ddcb85a2ab: Mother and I must pay a tithe of blood to the vampyres. Father would have protected us, but he is no longer with us, although his presence still walks among us in the fields. We pay with the blood of others.
textByHash.e360b01fa66b262e6e4c36ea39268541fb20a714: I need you to grow some onions in one of these vegetable patches, from seed until they are fully grown - then I will give you some orchid seeds.
textByHash.ef909c0b97b318aef32b67c9e86911d5df680ff8: Yes, I agree - far too long.
textByHash.f0bb0fa611a145bd61e2f9e74c78d942f49d8e2c: Sometimes I travel to market fairs in distant lands, and I use my feminine arts to lure young farmers back to this land; then the vampyres come for them and I see them no more.
textByHash.f614893c97ba7d6b12af1c84cbcae06acf8387c1: I can't believe you're asking me to do that! I asked you to grow some onions for me, not for me to look after them for you! No, I won't look after them!
textByHash.fbc33b1f328c9327afba946cf37b475561f89c8f: My mother, Alice, tends to our farming shop in yonder farmhouse, while I tend to this small allotment. Passing trade has quite literally died off in recent years, and with it our income.
textByHash.fe3c50aa722e06097a3354cf9c79a875485e51c9: You must pass a test first. These are no ordinary flowers, and no ordinary farmer can grow them. You must grow onions here in one of these patches, and when they are fully grown I will give you the seeds.
